title: Shopify 首页 Hero Banner
prompt_template: A cinematic brand hero banner for {brand_name}, horizontal 16:9 composition (1792x1024). Center: {hero_product} on a {background_texture} surface (marble / concrete / wood) with dramatic side lighting. Background: oversized cropped typography bleeding off-frame in {brand_color_hex} with embossed texture. Foreground: subtle fog and sparkle elements. Style: high-end fashion magazine, Apple commercial aesthetic, sharp focus on product, shallow depth of field on background, premium independent-brand website hero image, 1792x1024.
